body: Proof note: no new core helper is needed for exact runtime-backed task_update / approval_required SSE enrichment. `RuntimeEvent::project()` and `RuntimeEvent::primary_entity_ref()` already expose the task/approval identity the API needs, and the new domain test `task_and_approval_events_already_carry_identity_for_enrichment` proves `TaskCreated` and `ApprovalRequested` carry the right ownership/entity refs. Targeted proof commands: `cargo test -p cairn-domain --lib --quiet` and `cargo test -p cairn-api --test sse_payload_alignment --quiet` both passed. The remaining gap is in API/store composition, not missing domain truth.
